title: OmniBlast: Blast Furnace and Smoker recipe list completed
description: OmniBlast is a quality of life Datapack for Minecraft that completes the recipe lists of the Blast Furnace and Smoker to enable faster cooking for blocks and items that have only a standard Furnace recipe (e.g., Glass, Glazed Terracota, Cactus, etc.)
body:
OmniBlast: Blast Furnace and Smoker recipe list completed
=========================================================

OmniBlast is a quality of life Datapack for Minecraft that completes the
recipe lists of the Blast Furnace and Smoker to enable faster cooking for
blocks and items that have only a standard Furnace recipe (e.g., Glass,
Glazed Terracota, Cactus, etc.)

As usual, cooking time is divided by two w.r.t. the Furnace, XP gains are unchanged.

Blasting
--------

* Glass (from Sand and Red Sand)
* All color Glazed Terracotta
* Terracotta (from Clay block)
* Bricks (from Clay, Netherack)
* Cracked Bricks and Tiles (Deepslate, Nether, Blackstone, Stone, etc.)
* Cobbles to Stone (including Deepslate)

Smoking
-------

* Lime Dye (from Sea Pickle)
* Green Dye (from Cactus)
* Popped Chorus Fruit (from Chorus Fruit)
* Sponge (from Wet Sponge)

Notes
-----

1. Glass recipe inputs from tag `#smelts_to_glass` and thus should be compatible with mods

You may also like
-----------------

* [OmniCut: Better Wood, Copper, and Stone Cutter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/omnicut-better-wood-stone-cutter) use the stonecutter to **cut wood logs** into a variety of wood products (e.g., stairs, slabs, fences, doors, etc.); **cut Copper block** to Cut Copper Stairs and Slabs variants, as well as **oxidized doors and trapdoors**; convert **Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate**. Prices have been set carefully to avoid exploitation.
* [RecycleBlast](https://modrinth.com/datapack/recycle-blast) adds recipes for scrapping metal armor pieces, horse armors, tools, and rails. Prices have been set carefully to avoid exploitation.
* [RecycleLeather](https://modrinth.com/datapack/recycle-leather) adds recipes for scrapping leather armor pieces, and horse saddles and armors.
* [HorseArmorCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horse-armor-craft) adds smart recipes to craft horse armors and saddles.
* [HoneyStickyPiston](https://modrinth.com/datapack/honey-sticky-piston) use honeycombs as an alternative to slime balls to craft sticky pistons.
